source_request: Plan GitHub issue #2: Define Kontour Console V0 Projection Read Model.

criteria.description: Projection envelope and object types are documented.
criteria.notes: Expected evidence: doc citations for KontourConsoleProjection plus summary, claims, processes, gates, reviewItems, evidence, decisions, actions, exceptions, and links.

criteria.description: The relationship between event stream and projection snapshot is explicit.
criteria.notes: Expected evidence: doc citations for event replay, deterministic folding, derivedFrom metadata, snapshot seeding, and direct snapshot fallback.

criteria.description: The projection schema can represent the Campfit mapping example.
criteria.notes: Expected evidence: inline JSON or fixture inspection showing Campfit provider field, Surface claim, Flow review item, evidence, decision/action, and links.

criteria.description: The projection schema can represent Surface current claim status independent of run picker state.
criteria.notes: Expected evidence: current claim status/freshness projection can render without selected Flow run while retaining optional process/action/evidence links.

goal_fit.summary: Pending execution and verification. The plan preserves R1-R4 and AC1-AC4, limits scope to docs/specs plus optional examples/fixtures, and excludes reducer, UI, hosted cache/storage, hosted ingestion, and adapters.
